description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a symmetrical facade, featuring a central entryway flanked by large windows and a prominent gabled roof. The exterior is primarily white with gray accents, and the house is surrounded by a paved driveway and several mature trees. The front entrance is accentuated by a small porch with columns and steps leading up to the door. The windows are arranged in neat, symmetrical rows, contributing to a balanced and classic appearance. The roof is mostly gabled with a flat section at the center, possibly for a rooftop terrace or utility area. The landscaping includes a mix of trees and shrubs, providing a welcoming and established look.
description: A two-story white house with a gabled roof, symmetrical windows, a central entry porch, and surrounding trees and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, symmetrical windows, and the driveway leading up to the house, with trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway extending to the rear, the flat central roof section, and trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, the flat roof section, and a row of trees behind the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway loop, side windows, and dense tree placement along the property edge.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, small porch, columns, and a decorative overhang
